items.name: 学秀作大日如来像・学秀作七菩薩像

en.name_romaji: Gakushū Saku Dainichi Nyorai Zō Gakushū Saku Shichi Bosatsu Zō
en.name_en: Dainichi Nyorai Statue and Seven Bodhisattva Statues Made by Gakushu
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the sculpture category (Buddhist statues). Town-designated by Rokunohe Town. Designated on 2001-10-14. Located in the precincts of Gessoji Temple, Tsurubami district.

items.name: 旧苫米地家住宅
items.location: 国道45号線沿い「道の駅ろくのへ」隣（柳町より移築）
items.description: 旧六戸町柳町にあったオイラセ川流域最古の住宅とされる旧家。平成17年3月に道の駅ろくのへ隣に移築。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property in the buildings category (residence). Town-designated by Rokunohe Town. Designated on 1992-11-30. Located beside National Route 45 next to Michi-no-Eki Rokunohe (relocated from Yanagimachi).

items.name: 鶴喰鶏舞
items.description: 鶴喰集落に伝わる鶏舞。

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property (rooster dance). Town-designated by Rokunohe Town. Designated on 1980-02-18. Located in the Tsurubami settlement.

items.name: 折茂今熊神楽
items.description: 折茂集落に伝わる神楽舞。

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property (kagura dance). Town-designated by Rokunohe Town. Designated on 1980-02-18. Located in the Orimo settlement.

items.name: 上吉田南部駒舞
items.description: 上吉田地区に伝わる南部駒舞。

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property (horse dance). Town-designated by Rokunohe Town. Designated on 1980-02-18. Located in the Kamiyoshida district.

items.name: 上吉田大黒舞
items.description: 上吉田地区に伝わる大黒舞。

en.description_en: An intangible folk cultural property (Daikoku dance). Town-designated by Rokunohe Town. Located in the Kamiyoshida district.

items.name: 久乃助のイチイ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A natural monument (Japanese yew tree). Town-designated by Rokunohe Town. Designated on 1992-11-30. Located within Rokunohe Town.

items.name: 今熊神社の杉
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 今熊保食神社境内の杉の大木。

en.description_en: A natural monument (cedar tree). Town-designated by Rokunohe Town. Designated on 1992-11-30. Located about 1 km northwest of the Orimo settlement.

items.name: 鶴喰若宮八幡宮のサワラ・カツラ・銀杏
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 鶴喰若宮八幡宮境内の三大樹木（サワラ・カツラ・銀杏）。

en.name_romaji: Tsurubami Wakamiya Hachimangū no Sawara Katsura Ichō
en.name_en: Sawara Cypress, Katsura, and Ginkgo of Tsurubami Wakamiya Hachiman Shrine
en.description_en: A natural monument (Sawara cypress, katsura, and ginkgo trees). Town-designated by Rokunohe Town. Designated on 1992-11-30. Located south of the Tsurubami settlement.
